( 287 ``` 288 289 The component accesses `card.comments.length` directly. If `card.comments` is `undefined` or `null`, this will throw a `TypeError` at render time. []).length === 0 ?` or `{!card.comments?.length ?` would prevent this. '')` to initialize edit state. While the save flow correctly calls `setIsEditingTitle(false)` on success (which hides the input), if the parent re-renders with a new card value while editing is open, the input may display a stale value. 299 300 This is a common React pattern limitation.
